_comment: AgentGuard MCP Gateway config for Claude Desktop. See claude-desktop-config.md for the file path on each OS, setup steps, and verification. Source: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/quickstart/user (verified 2026-05-05). Do NOT pass --api-key '$AGENTGUARD_API_KEY' as an args entry — Claude Desktop does not shell-expand $VAR in JSON args. Inject the key via the env block; the gateway reads AGENTGUARD_API_KEY from the environment when the --api-key flag is absent. v0.5 is single-tenant: --tenant-id must be 'local'.
